title: trace event schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for an append-only correlation record emitted by the bridge. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/TraceEventRequirements.swift for Phase 1 field requirements.

eventType.description: Well-known event kind. Additional kinds may be rejected by strict validators.

traceId.description: Correlation identifier shared across all events for one top-level user request.

parentEventId.description: Identifier of the parent event, if any, forming a trace tree.

subjectRef.description: Reference to the entity this event is about (intent id, task ref, plan ref, etc.).

status.description: Runtime status of the event (e.g. ok, error, pending).

payloadSummary.description: Compact, non-sensitive summary of the event payload.

payloadHash.description: Cryptographic hash of the canonical serialized payload for integrity.

artifactRefs.description: References to artifacts produced or consumed by this event.

approvalRefs.description: References to approval requests or resolutions tied to this event.

attributes.description: Kind-specific key-value attributes required or useful for validation and correlation.
